name: Orange-Poppy Seed Muffies
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine dry ingredients in a 1-quart mixing bowl and mix well.
2. Process zest with sugar in a food processor or blender until finely combined.
3. Add orange sugar to the mixing bowl along with remaining ingredients (except marmalade).
4. Stir until everything is well combined; discard any small lumps.
5. Stir in currants.
6. Chill, covered airtight, for at least 4 hours to allow the mixture to thicken.
7. Drop about 2 tablespoons of thickened batter, spaced 2 inches apart, onto greased baking sheets.
8. Sprinkle with additional cereal if desired.
9. Bake in the center of a 425-degree oven until tops have taken on a slight color and edges are lightly browned, about 7-8 minutes, rotating pans if browning is uneven.
10. Do not overbake.
11. Cool on racks.
Makes 16 (3-inch) muffins.
